locator.quote: Defensive-action framing is empirically easier for RL on sparse

text: E4 idea: defensive-action framing is empirically easier for RL on sparse events — default-safe (override to act) has higher gradient SNR than default-bad (act to fix).

locator.quote: rather than positive exploration cost (default behaviour is the bad

text: Zero exploration cost (action defaults to a safe behaviour) rather than positive exploration cost (default behaviour is the bad one) is what raises the per-invocation SNR.
